subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath reached me. It was not a mere letter, but rather the effect of a musk-laden pen, a celestial rose-garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید نامه نبود اثر خامه مشکین بود گلشن برین بود ایت
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
